flow_overview: An online careers portal that lets applicants discover MBTA job openings, refine results with filters and sorting, inspect detailed postings, and initiate an application.
capability_summary: Career landing and job openings access
Job detail inspection and application initiation

requirements.text: The system shall provide a dedicated careers area from which users can access job openings and related applicant resources.
requirements.rationale: The sequence starts on an MBTA Careers landing page and then moves into a dedicated Job Openings area, showing that the careers portal supports entry into the hiring workflow.

requirements.text: The system shall allow users to browse a catalog of open job postings in a dedicated job listings view.
requirements.rationale: Multiple screenshots show a Job Openings page with a scrollable list of vacancies and a jobs found count, indicating a dedicated listings interface.

requirements.text: The system shall support discoverability of job postings through keyword search over the listings catalog.
requirements.rationale: A search field is persistently visible on the job openings page while the user browses filtered and unfiltered results.

requirements.text: The system shall allow applicants to filter job openings by department.
requirements.rationale: The filter drawer exposes a Department facet and a department selection count becomes active after selection, showing department-based refinement.

requirements.text: The system shall allow applicants to filter job openings by estimated annual salary range or threshold.
requirements.rationale: The filter flow includes an Estimated Annual Salary facet with selectable salary bands including a $100,000+ option.

requirements.text: The system shall support combining multiple filter criteria to narrow job results.
requirements.rationale: The filter panel shows more than one active facet at once, and the resulting listings are reduced to a small set after combined filtering.

requirements.text: The system shall provide visible feedback about how many filters are active and which filter categories currently contain selections.
requirements.rationale: Badges and counters are shown on the filter panel and on the main Filter control, making active refinement state visible to the user.

requirements.text: The system shall keep the displayed result set consistent with the selected filter criteria and the reported jobs found count.
requirements.rationale: After the department and salary selections are active, the listings show three matching safety jobs with salaries above 100k, but full data correctness still depends on backend filtering logic.

requirements.text: The system shall allow users to sort job listings by multiple criteria, including posting date, title, and salary.
requirements.rationale: The sort drawer explicitly lists multiple ordering modes such as posting date, job title, and salary.

requirements.text: The system shall expose posting recency and closing-status information in the job results so users can judge which openings are most recent or still open.
requirements.rationale: List entries display posting age and closing indicators such as 'Posted 2 weeks ago' and 'Closes in 14 hours', which support latest-opening review.

requirements.text: The system shall present summary information for each job in list view, including title, compensation, department, and a brief description.
requirements.rationale: Each listing card includes the job title, salary, department, and summary text before the user opens a detail view.

requirements.text: The system shall allow users to navigate from a job listing to a detailed view for an individual opening.
requirements.rationale: The flow moves from a filtered job list to a detailed panel for a selected opening, showing list-to-detail navigation.

requirements.text: The system shall present comprehensive job details before application, including salary, location, job type, job number, closing information, department, and full descriptive content.
requirements.rationale: The detail view exposes structured metadata and a long-form description for the selected role, supporting informed application decisions.

requirements.text: The system shall provide an explicit action for applicants to begin applying from the detailed job view.
requirements.rationale: A prominent APPLY control is visible in the job detail panel, indicating that application initiation is supported from the detail page.

requirements.text: The system shall support a downstream application workflow after the applicant selects Apply for a job.
requirements.rationale: The apply action is clearly present, and the task context includes applying, but the subsequent submission steps are not shown in this screenshot sequence.

requirements.text: The system shall preserve the applicant's current discovery context while moving between filtering, result inspection, and job detail viewing.
requirements.rationale: The filtered context leads into a selected job detail from the same narrowed result set, but persistence behavior across all navigation cases is only partially observable.

requirements.text: The system shall support sharing or external dissemination of job postings from the listings or detail views.
requirements.rationale: Social and email style action icons are visible beside job entries and in the detail panel, suggesting posting-sharing functionality, though the behavior is not executed here.

requirements.text: The system shall allow users to subscribe to job posting alerts for future openings.
requirements.rationale: The careers landing page includes a dedicated Job Posting Alerts area, which strongly indicates an alert subscription capability even though the enrollment flow is not shown.

requirements.text: The system shall allow users to create a job alert directly from their current search and filter context so future matching openings can be delivered without re-entering the criteria.
requirements.rationale:
Contrastive import from staged bundle
Intended label: partially_fulfilled
Mutation family: persistence_extension
Source gold requirement: REQ-18
Source gold text: The system shall allow users to subscribe to job posting alerts for future openings.
Generation rationale: This stays tightly anchored to the visible alert capability and the established search and filtering workflow, but extends it so the current discovery context is remembered and reused. That makes it realistic for the same product space while pushing evaluation toward partial fulfillment because the future matching and persistence behavior depend on hidden state.
requirements.parent_harvest_text: The system shall allow users to subscribe to job posting alerts for future openings.

requirements.text: The system shall provide visible confirmation that a selected job posting has been handed off to the chosen external sharing channel or compose surface.
requirements.rationale:
Contrastive import from staged bundle
Intended label: partially_fulfilled
Mutation family: external_effect_extension
Source gold requirement: REQ-17
Source gold text: The system shall support sharing job postings through external channels such as social media and email.
Generation rationale: The gold set already grounds external sharing through visible share controls. This candidate adds a realistic downstream feedback expectation after invoking that capability, which is useful contrast because icon presence alone does not prove successful handoff to an external channel.
requirements.parent_harvest_text: The system shall support sharing job postings through external channels such as social media and email.

requirements.text: The system shall ensure that every job shown after search and filtering satisfies all selected criteria across the complete result set, not only the initially visible listings.
requirements.rationale:
Contrastive import from staged bundle
Intended label: abstain
Mutation family: completeness_or_universal_quantifier
Source gold requirement: REQ-08
Source gold text: The system shall keep the displayed result set consistent with the selected filter criteria and the reported jobs found count.
Generation rationale: This is a disciplined strengthening of the existing result-consistency requirement from local visible agreement to full-result correctness. It remains very plausible in the same workflow, but it is hard to settle from screenshots alone because universal correctness depends on unseen results and backend filtering behavior.
requirements.parent_harvest_text: The system shall keep the displayed result set consistent with the selected filter criteria and the reported jobs found count.

requirements.text: The system shall allow public browsing of job listings and posting details, while requiring applicant authentication before entering the application workflow.
requirements.rationale:
Contrastive import from staged bundle
Intended label: abstain
Mutation family: policy_or_role_extension
Source gold requirement: REQ-01
Source gold text: The system shall provide a dedicated careers area from which users can access job openings and related applicant resources.
Generation rationale: A careers portal commonly separates open browsing from authenticated applicant actions, so this is a realistic role and policy extension of the accepted careers-area requirement. It broadens coverage toward abstention because the flow shows discovery behavior but does not establish the authentication boundary for application entry.
requirements.parent_harvest_text: The system shall provide a dedicated careers area from which users can access job openings and related applicant resources.

requirements.text: The system shall provide a visible control on the detailed job view that starts the application workflow for the selected opening.
requirements.rationale:
Contrastive import from staged bundle
Intended label: not_fulfilled
Mutation family: missing_visible_step
Source gold requirement: REQ-12
Source gold text: The system shall allow users to navigate from a job listing to a detailed view for an individual opening.
Generation rationale: This is the most natural next visible phase after list-to-detail inspection and it is directly aligned with the task's apply objective. It is a strong contrastive candidate because the accepted gold set establishes detail viewing but does not by itself establish a visible application entry point.
requirements.parent_harvest_text: The system shall allow users to navigate from a job listing to a detailed view for an individual opening.

requirements.text: The system shall let users remove individual active search or filter criteria directly from the results view and immediately refresh the matching job set.
requirements.rationale:
Contrastive import from staged bundle
Intended label: not_fulfilled
Mutation family: stronger_visible_constraint
Source gold requirement: REQ-07
Source gold text: The system shall provide visible feedback about how many filters are active and which filter categories currently contain selections.
Generation rationale: The gold requirement already grounds active-filter visibility, so a nearby stronger capability is direct criterion removal from the results context rather than merely showing counts or selected categories. This remains tightly within the same discovery workflow while likely increasing not-fulfilled coverage because the accepted evidence does not establish inline criterion removal and live result refresh from that action.
requirements.parent_harvest_text: The system shall provide visible feedback about how many filters are active and which filter categories currently contain selections.
